title: Learning to Cook
sentences: I never learned to cook because my parents always did it for me.
When I moved out, I had to figure out how to feed myself.
At first, I burned almost everything I tried to make.
Although I made a lot of mistakes, I did not give up.
I looked up simple recipes on the internet.
My neighbour showed me how to make a proper stew.
I started to enjoy chopping vegetables and mixing spices.
Cooking helps me relax after a long day at work.
Although some meals still go wrong, I am improving.
My friends are always happy to try out my new dishes.
I have come a long way since I first left home.
